narrations.assessor: Adam reviews Travel — lost luggage for Grace and flags it for fraud review
narrations.settlement: Seth reviews settlement for Grace — declined on fraud grounds
narrations.comms: Cara explains to Grace that the claim is DENIED following the fraud review — claim closed

extras.narration: Felix runs a fraud check and finds inconsistencies in the timeline and supporting documents.

beats.narration: Grace realises her luggage didn't arrive and contacts Zava Insurance.
Grace heads from the travel hub through the neighbourhood to the Zava Insurance Claims Office to lodge her claim.
Grace walks into the Zava Claims building and approaches reception.
Grace lodges her Travel — lost luggage claim at the Zava Insurance reception.
Iris captures the airline reference and items list.
Iris routes the claim to the Claims Assessor.
Adam reviews the travel policy and item evidence.
Adam notes inconsistencies in the items list — escalates to fraud review.
Felix runs a fraud check and finds inconsistencies in the timeline and supporting documents.
Adam hands the fraud-flagged claim to Settlement with a recommendation to decline.
Seth declines the claim on fraud grounds and prepares the decline notice.
Cara calls Grace with the final decision — claim DENIED following the fraud review — and explains the outcome and review options in plain English.
